rag_rules: Fix AGREE syntax errors by correcting mismatched parentheses, missing terminators, and invalid token sequences in timing constraints.
Ensure all AGREE expressions use only visible identifiers from the AADL model and avoid introducing unqualified package references.
generic_rules: When generating AGREE contracts, validate that all identifiers and types are declared or visible in the current scope.
Use only valid AADL feature names and data types in AGREE expressions to prevent type mismatches.
Place implementation-specific assignments in implementation annexes and type-level guarantees in component type annexes.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks with valid syntax for expressions and declarations.
Timing constraints must use valid AADL time units and proper comparison operators without syntax errors.
anti_patterns: Do not introduce new package-qualified identifiers or data types not present in the AADL model.
Do not place implementation-level guarantees in component type annexes; move them to implementation annexes or remove them.
irrelevant_topics: Component type annexes vs implementation annexes
